backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the school management backend with user profiles, student records, notices, exams, and advertisements, all protected by role-based access control (admin/user permissions).
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that upgrades the actor state from an older schema (students, notices, exams) to a newer one by adding an empty ads map and initializing nextAdId to 1.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping four advertisement-related features (React Query hooks, Advertisements page, nav integration, Home page preview) to their implementation files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a quick reference for the purpose and content of each file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes with neutral color scales.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell with the page title set to 'Suraj Navodaya App' and a root div for the React application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing active page state across five pages (home, students, notices, exams, advertisements) and composing the Header, main content area, and Footer.
frontend/src/components/EmptyState.tsx: Reusable empty-state UI component that renders a centered icon, title, and description for lists with no data.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: App footer displaying the school brand name, dynamic copyright year, and a caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM parameters.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky maroon header with school branding, a desktop nav bar, and a mobile hamburger menu, including an 'Advertisements' link with a Megaphone icon alongside the other navigation entries.
frontend/src/components/PageHeader.tsx: Reusable page header component rendering an optional icon, title, subtitle, and an optional action slot in a responsive flex layout.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider component, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for CRUD operations on Students, Notices, Exams, and Ads by calling the backend actor, with cache invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind CSS, and defines CSS custom properties for a Navodaya maroon-and-gold light/dark theme.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Advertisements.tsx: Page component for managing advertisements, displaying ad cards with active/inactive toggling, an add-ad dialog form, and loading skeletons.
frontend/src/pages/ExamSchedule.tsx: Page component that lists exam entries sorted by date in a table with upcoming/past badges, and provides a dialog form to add new exams.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Dashboard home page that displays stat cards (notices, students, exams, ads counts), a hero banner, and preview sections for recent notices, upcoming exams, and active ads with navigation callbacks.
frontend/src/pages/NoticesBoard.tsx: Notices board page that lists school announcements sorted by date, with expandable notice cards and an admin dialog form to add new notices via the useAddNotice mutation.
frontend/src/pages/Students.tsx: Students page that displays a searchable grid of student cards with house-color badges, and includes an admin dialog form to add new students via the useAddStudent mutation.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read URL/hash query parameters, persist them to sessionStorage, and clean sensitive params (like admin tokens) from the URL hash without reloading.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom maroon and gold color palettes, serif/sans font families, dark mode, and extended shadow/animation tokens using oklch color values.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file for 'Suraj Navodaya App' that records existing implemented features and pending new feature requests related to adding an advertisements/ads module to the app.
